'''havotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadfoot|leadfoot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadfoot|leadfoot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| havotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hævetheth|hævetheth]] || [[word:hævethej|hævethej]] || [[word:hævethesh|hævethesh]] || [[word:hævethe|hævethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:havovothoth|havovothoth]] || [[word:havovothoj|havovothoj]] || [[word:havovothosh|havovothosh]] || [[word:havovotho|havovotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:havothoth|havothoth]] || [[word:havothoj|havothoj]] || [[word:havothosh|havothosh]] || [[word:havotho|havotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:havofthoth|havofthoth]] || [[word:havofthoj|havofthoj]] || [[word:havofthosh|havofthosh]] || [[word:havofthof|havofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:havothotho|havothotho]] || [[word:havothojo|havothojo]] || [[word:havothosho|havothosho]] || [[word:havothoko|havothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:havothoth|havothoth]] || [[word:havothoj|havothoj]] || [[word:havothosh|havothosh]] || [[word:havotho|havotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:havothothol|havothothol]] || [[word:havothojol|havothojol]] || [[word:havothoshol|havothoshol]] || [[word:havothokol|havothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:havothothotho|havothothotho]] || [[word:havothojojo|havothojojo]] || [[word:havothoshosho|havothoshosho]] || [[word:havothoko|havothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:havothothon|havothothon]] || [[word:havothojon|havothojon]] || [[word:havothoshon|havothoshon]] || [[word:havothokon|havothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:havothothoro|havothothoro]] || [[word:havothojoro|havothojoro]] || [[word:havothoshoro|havothoshoro]] || [[word:havothokoro|havothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
